title: Sound Physics Perfected
description: A Ray tracing implementation to have Sound Physics in Minecraft. I believe this is more accurate + sounds better than Sound Physics mod.
body:
A Ray Traced audio implementation in Minecraft by RedDev (me). This is dissimilar to Sound Physics mod because the raycasting is cast from player rather than sound sources (which is theoretically more optimized). Reverb is as accurate as possible using OpenAL. Mod is developed based on the framework discussed in the video A First look at Ray Traced Audio by Vercidium. Also is SVC compatible, Sinytra compatible, yipeee.

tl;dr cool ray traced audio weooooow.
